name: 200° Coffee
description: The company emphasizes its passion for coffee and offers hand-roasted coffee blends delivered directly to customers in mainland UK. They also provide options for wholesale and workplace coffee.

name: Eurocoffee UAE
description: Eurocoffee is a leading distributor and supplier of coffee products in the UAE, specializing in coffee machines, grinders, and a variety of coffee beans and capsules, including Lavazza. They provide comprehensive coffee solutions for both commercial and office settings.

name: Coffee1
description: Coffee#1 is a provider of high-quality coffee, emphasizing a relaxing atmosphere crafted by skilled baristas, making it an ideal spot for enjoying ground coffee.

name: Green Farm Coffee
description: Green Farm Coffee specializes in artisan coffee products, offering a diverse selection of slow-roasted ground coffee, including single-origin options and unique blends. They provide their products in 227g pack bags, catering to both wholesale clients and individual consumers.

name: Juan Valdez Café
description: Juan Valdez® Café is a prominent manufacturer and retailer of premium Colombian coffee, known for its high-quality ground coffee that highlights the craftsmanship of Colombian coffee growers. The company emphasizes manual collection and selection of coffee beans, ensuring a superior coffee experience.

name: O'Coffee
description: The company is a prominent manufacturer and provider of Specialty Coffee, emphasizing its Direct Trade practices and commitment to sustainability. They offer a diverse range of coffee profiles, including Green Coffee and Export Coffee sourced from Brazilian estates.

name: Grinders Coffee
description: Grinders Coffee specializes in sourcing, roasting, and delivering premium ground coffee, offering a wide variety of rich flavor coffee beans and capsules. With a focus on quality and sustainability, the company ensures an exceptional coffee experience through its master roasters and advanced technology.

name: Raw Coffee
description: RAW Coffee Company specializes in ethically traded, organic coffee, offering high-quality ground coffee sourced from premium Arabica beans.

name: FreshGround
description: FreshGround has been dedicated to providing exceptional coffee experiences since 1982, offering a range of high-quality ground coffee options like their Fast Jazz Whole Bean Coffee, which features bold flavors and unique tasting notes. Their commitment to quality coffee enhances workplace culture and team well-being, making it a vital perk for any office environment.

name: Beans And Grind Inc.
description: Beans And Grind is a prominent provider of coffee services, offering a diverse range of quality ground coffee from well-known brands like Starbucks and Lavazza, tailored for both business and home office environments. Their commitment to exceptional customer service ensures a premium coffee experience.
